title: Full Stack Developer
description: Become a complete developer who can build entire applications from scratch. Covers frontend, backend, DevOps, and system design — everything needed to ship production-ready apps.

nodes.title: HTML5 & Semantic Markup
nodes.description: The foundation of web pages. Learn tags, forms, semantic elements, and accessibility basics.

nodes.title: CSS3 & Modern Layouts
nodes.description: Flexbox, Grid, responsive design, animations, and CSS custom properties for beautiful UIs.

nodes.title: JavaScript ES6+
nodes.description: Modern JavaScript — async/await, modules, destructuring, closures, prototypes, and the event loop.

nodes.title: TypeScript
nodes.description: Add static typing to JavaScript for safer, more maintainable full-stack codebases.

nodes.title: React & Hooks
nodes.description: Component-based UI with React — hooks, state management, context, and modern patterns.

nodes.title: Next.js (Full Stack Framework)
nodes.description: SSR, SSG, API routes, and full-stack React development with the Next.js framework.

nodes.title: Node.js & Express
nodes.description: Build backend APIs with Node.js and Express — routing, middleware, error handling, and file uploads.

nodes.title: Databases (SQL + NoSQL)
nodes.description: PostgreSQL for relational data and MongoDB/Redis for NoSQL. Learn both paradigms.

nodes.title: ORM / Query Builder
nodes.description: Prisma, Drizzle, or SQLAlchemy for type-safe database access and migrations.

nodes.title: Authentication & Authorization
nodes.description: JWT tokens, OAuth 2.0, NextAuth.js, session management, and role-based access control.

nodes.title: State Management
nodes.description: Server state vs client state — React Query/TanStack Query, Zustand, or Redux Toolkit.

nodes.title: Full Stack Testing
nodes.description: Unit tests (Jest/Vitest), component tests (RTL), E2E tests (Playwright), and API testing.

nodes.title: Docker & Containers
nodes.description: Containerize your full-stack app with Docker and Docker Compose for consistent environments.

nodes.title: CI/CD Pipelines
nodes.description: Automated testing and deployment with GitHub Actions — lint, test, build, and deploy on every push.

nodes.title: Deployment & Hosting
nodes.description: Deploy frontend on Vercel/Netlify, backend on Railway/Render, and databases on Supabase/PlanetScale.

nodes.title: Git & Collaboration
nodes.description: Git workflows, branching strategies, code reviews, and open-source contribution practices.

nodes.title: Performance Optimization
nodes.description: Core Web Vitals, lazy loading, image optimization, database query optimization, and caching.

nodes.title: Application Security
nodes.description: OWASP Top 10, XSS/CSRF prevention, input validation, dependency auditing, and secure headers.

nodes.title: System Design Fundamentals
nodes.description: Scalability, load balancing, caching layers, database sharding, message queues, and microservices.

nodes.title: Monitoring & Observability
nodes.description: Application monitoring, logging, error tracking (Sentry), and performance monitoring.

nodes.title: Real-time Features
nodes.description: WebSockets, Server-Sent Events, Socket.io for chat, notifications, and live updates.

nodes.title: GraphQL (Optional)
nodes.description: Alternative to REST — type-safe API queries with GraphQL and Apollo Server/Client.

nodes.title: Payments Integration
nodes.description: Stripe payments, subscriptions, webhooks, and handling payment flows securely.

nodes.title: Search (Elasticsearch/Algolia)
nodes.description: Full-text search with Elasticsearch or Algolia for powerful search functionality.

nodes.title: Email & Notifications
nodes.description: Transactional emails with SendGrid/Resend and push notifications for user engagement.

nodes.title: Cloud Services (AWS/GCP)
nodes.description: AWS S3, EC2, Lambda, CloudFront, or GCP equivalents for scalable cloud infrastructure.

nodes.title: Redis & Caching
nodes.description: In-memory caching with Redis for sessions, rate limiting, and performance optimization.

nodes.title: Background Jobs
nodes.description: BullMQ, Celery, or Cloud Tasks for async processing — emails, reports, and scheduled tasks.
